items.title: California of Europe: Vineyards, Resorts and 100 Miles of Coastline
items.summary: A travel feature spotlights Portugal's scenic wine country, luxury resorts and long stretches of Atlantic coastline.

items.title: 14 Must-Try Portuguese Dishes, from Egg Tarts to Iberian Pork
items.summary: A roundup of essential Portuguese food, from pastel de nata to grilled fish and Iberian pork dishes.

items.title: 16 Best Beaches in Portugal for Scenic Coastlines and Sun
items.summary: A guide to Portugal's top beaches, highlighting dramatic Algarve cliffs and golden Atlantic shores.

items.title: Foreign Travel Demand Drives Portugal Tourism Growth
items.summary: International visitor numbers continue to rise, fuelling strong tourism growth across Portugal this season.
